---
title: "Prenatal Exposure to Chemical Mixtures and Metabolic Syndrome Risk in European Children"
date: 2024-01-01
author:
  - name: Lorenzo Fabbri
    orcid: 0000-0003-3031-322X
    affiliation: ISGlobal, Universitat Pompeu Fabra
categories:
  - Exposome
  - Metabolic Health
  - Environmental Epidemiology
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    G&uuml;il Oumrait N, Stratakis N, Maitre L, Anguita Ruiz A, Urquiza J, <strong>Fabbri L</strong>, Basaga&ntilde;a X, Heude B, Sm&aring;stuen Haug L, Kaur Sakhi A, et al. "Prenatal Exposure to Chemical Mixtures and Metabolic Syndrome Risk in European Children." Presented at the ISEE Annual Conference 2024 (2024). doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1289/isee.2024.1562"><code>10.1289/isee.2024.1562</code></a>
  links:
    - name: Abstract
      url: https://doi.org/10.1289/isee.2024.1562
      icon: fa-solid fa-scroll
    - name: Add to Zotero
      url: https://www.zotero.org/save?type=doi&q=10.1289/isee.2024.1562
      icon: ai ai-zotero
doi: 10.1289/isee.2024.1562
---

**Conference:** ISEE Annual Conference 2024

## BibTeX citation

```bibtex
@inproceedings{guil2024prenatal,
  title={Prenatal Exposure to Chemical Mixtures and Metabolic Syndrome Risk in European Children},
  author={G{\"u}il Oumrait, Nuria and Stratakis, Nikos and Maitre, L{\'e}a and Anguita Ruiz, Augusto and Urquiza, Jose and Fabbri, Lorenzo and Basaga{\~n}a, Xavier and Heude, Barbara and Sm{\aa}stuen Haug, Line and Kaur Sakhi, Amrit and others},
  booktitle={ISEE Annual Conference 2024},
  year={2024}
}
```
